headline: AI Models Split on Market Direction Ahead of Fed Meeting
summary: Models showed mixed sentiment with notable disagreements on key tech stocks, particularly SPY and QQQ. While most models favored bullish positions overall, confidence levels remained moderate (50-78%), suggesting uncertainty around the Fed meeting impact and tech earnings.

consensus_picks.note: Four models predicted SPY upside despite Claude's contrarian Fed volatility call.
Strong consensus on NVDA benefiting from hyperscaler AI infrastructure spending.
Tech-heavy index saw bullish consensus except Gemini's contrarian rate-driven bearish call.
Apple drew unanimous bullish sentiment from all models that covered it.

best_call.summary: Results pending market close to determine best performing prediction.

worst_call.summary: Results pending market close to determine worst performing prediction.
